content: Yuki, give me a status update on Kiro.

name: Yuki
content:
Here is your dashboard for today. You are doing well, keep it up.

<ui:metrics>{"title":"Productivity Score", "value":92, "unit":"%", "trend": "up", "percentage": 92}</ui:metrics>

<ui:table>{"headers":["Project", "Status"], "rows":[["Launch", "On Track"], ["Redesign", "Delayed"]]}</ui:table>
Okay, I want to plan the marketing launch.

name: Sage
content:
Let's structure this project. Fill this out so I know what we're dealing with.

<ui:planning-form>{"phase":1}</ui:planning-form>

name: Sage
content:
Great. I have a few clarifying questions about the scope.

<ui:ai-questions>{"artifactId":"mkt_launch","questions":[{"id":"q1","question":"Who is the primary target audience?","type":"text"}]}</ui:ai-questions>
Answered. Can you draft the project spec?

name: Sage
content:
Here is the drafted spec.

<ui:artifact-preview>{"artifactId":"mkt_launch","markdown":"# Marketing Launch
## Overview
Launch plan for Q3.
- Target: Developers
- Timeline: 4 weeks"}</ui:artifact-preview>
Looks good. Break it down into tasks.

name: Sage
content:
I've generated the task dependency graph.

<ui:task-graph>{"artifactId":"mkt_launch","stages":[{"stage":1,"stageName":"Foundation","tasks":[{"id":"task_1","title":"Draft Copy","estimate_min":60,"deadline":null,"depends_on":[]}]}]}</ui:task-graph>

<ui:task-manager>{"artifactId":"mkt_launch","stages":[{"stage":1,"stageName":"Foundation","tasks":[{"id":"task_1","title":"Draft Copy","estimate_min":60,"deadline":null,"depends_on":[]}]}]}</ui:task-manager>
Let's schedule the first few tasks for today.

name: Juno
content:
I've added them to your timeline. Here is the agenda and the first task.

<ui:timeline>{"items": [{"time":"14:00", "title":"Draft Copy", "durationMin":60}]}</ui:timeline>

<ui:task>{"title":"Draft Copy", "projectName":"Marketing", "estimateMin":60, "status":"pending", "scheduledDate":"Today"}</ui:task>
Wait, I also need to update my personal preferences.

name: Echo
content:
Sure, you can update your settings here.

<ui:form>{"type":"updatePreferences", "title":"Settings", "fields": [{"name":"timezone", "type":"string", "label":"Timezone"}]}</ui:form>

name: Yuki
content:
Focus time. Don't slack off.

<ui:timer>{"durationMin": 60, "label": "Deep Work"}</ui:timer>
I think I want to completely archive the old legacy project.

name: Yuki
content:
Whoa. That's a big move. Are you sure?

<ui:confirm>{"action":"archiveProject", "message":"Are you sure you want to archive Legacy?", "buttonText": "Yes, Archive"}</ui:confirm>
